name: auto-chat-cli
description: Local GPT/Gemini browser automation CLI for queued image and text jobs.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @wechat-topic/shared && npm run build -w @wechat-topic/extension && npm run build -w @wechat-topic/server
scripts.check: npm run build -w @wechat-topic/shared && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @wechat-topic/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.pack:extension: npm run build && rm -f auto-chat-extension.zip && cd apps/extension/dist && zip -r ../../../auto-chat-extension.zip .
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run check && npm test
